description: Calculate Manufacturing OEE and create a machine summary in /home/ga/Documents/production_logs.xlsx. On the 'Shift Logs' sheet, calculate Operating Time (Planned Minutes - Downtime Minutes), Availability (Operating Time / Planned Minutes), Performance ((Total Parts * (Ideal Cycle Time in seconds / 60)) / Operating Time), Quality ((Total Parts - Defect Parts) / Total Parts), and OEE (Availability * Performance * Quality) for all records. Format Availability, Performance, Quality, and OEE as percentages with one decimal place. On a new sheet named 'Machine Summary', list each unique Machine ID with its average OEE and a status of 'Needs Review' if the average OEE is less than 75% or 'Good' if it is
